description: SPM command-line launcher and gateway. The spm shell script selects a MATLAB/Octave/MATLAB-Runtime backend and forwards arguments to spm_standalone, which dispatches to the SPM GUI, the batch system, script/function execution, or a MATLABBATCH node via spm_cli.

inputs.name: MATLAB executable
inputs.description: Name (and path) of the MATLAB executable (tool default: matlab).

inputs.name: MATLAB Runtime home
inputs.description: Directory containing the MATLAB Runtime; required only to use the MCR backend.

inputs.name: SPM home directory
inputs.description: Directory containing (standalone) SPM (tool default: parent directory of the invoked bin script).

inputs.name: Octave executable
inputs.description: Name (and path) of the Octave executable (tool default: octave).

inputs.name: SPM mode
inputs.description: Top-level action/router token. If omitted, the SPM GUI is started.

inputs.name: GUI modality
inputs.description: SPM modality/defaults used when starting the GUI (case-insensitive). If omitted, the default GUI is started.

inputs.name: Silent
inputs.description: Suppress the SPM banner for the batch command.

inputs.name: Batch modality
inputs.description: Select the SPM modality/defaults for the batch command (tool default: fmri). Values are case-insensitive; numeric indices 1=PET, 2=FMRI, 3=EEG are also accepted.

inputs.name: Command-line defaults
inputs.description: Set SPM cmdline defaults flag for the batch command.

inputs.name: Batch job files/arguments
inputs.description: Remaining positional arguments passed to spm_jobman('run', ...). If none remain, an interactive batch manager window is opened.

inputs.name: MATLAB script
inputs.description: MATLAB script to execute. If omitted, SPM prompts interactively.

inputs.name: Script arguments
inputs.description: Remaining arguments assigned to the base workspace variable 'inputs'.

inputs.name: MATLAB function
inputs.description: MATLAB function to evaluate. If omitted, SPM prompts interactively.

inputs.name: Function arguments
inputs.description: Remaining arguments passed as inputs to feval.

inputs.name: MATLAB expression
inputs.description: MATLAB expression to evaluate. If omitted, SPM prompts interactively.

inputs.name: MATLABBATCH node path
inputs.description: Dot-separated node path or shortcut to run (e.g. spatial.smooth).

inputs.name: Node options and values
inputs.description: Node-specific --flag tokens and their values, supplied as separate tokens. The next token starting with '-' terminates value consumption for the preceding flag.

name: spm
